sections.title: Using a noteable item on him

lines.speaker: Chuck
lines.text: If you want that converted into a banknote, take it to a bank - banks made my work useless, so they can deal with your requests now. I've retired.

sections.title: Using a bank note on him

lines.speaker: Chuck
lines.text: If you want your banknotes converted, take them to a bank - banks made my work useless, so they can deal with your requests now. I've retired.

sections.title: Using an item that cannot be noted on him

lines.speaker: Chuck
lines.text: Even in your so-called modern era there's no such thing as a banknote for that. Hah!

lines.speaker: Chuck
lines.text: It's nice to meet you here, [player name].

lines.speaker: Chuck
lines.text: I'm Chuck. I used to exchange logs for certificates, so people could trade them in bulk more conveniently. Certificates were what we used before banks automatically issued banknotes for most tradeable items.

lines.speaker: Chuck
lines.text: Even today, banknotes are sometimes referred to as 'certs', in memory of the certificates we used before.

lines.speaker: Chuck
lines.text: I had colleagues who'd exchange other items for certificates - Niles, Miles and Giles were the most famous of us. But those three found new jobs rather than retiring like I did.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you think you might leave the Realm?

lines.speaker: Chuck
lines.text: No, I don't think so. The big high-street banks made my work useless, and I don't fancy joining Niles, Miles and Giles on their weird treks.

lines.speaker: Chuck
lines.text: No, I'll stay here and enjoy my retirement. It's nice of you to ask, though.
